home.title: Free Student Housing Platform — Find & List Rooms
home.description: OpenHospi is the free, open-source student housing platform for the Netherlands. Verified students only via SURFconext. No fees, no middlemen.

rooms.title: Student Rooms in the Netherlands
rooms.description: Browse available student rooms across Dutch cities. Free, verified, and fair for every student.

costs.question: Is OpenHospi really free?
costs.answer: Yes, OpenHospi is completely free for all students. There are no hidden fees, no premium plans, and no ads. We are funded by donations and sponsorships.

costs.question: How is OpenHospi funded?
costs.answer: OpenHospi is currently self-funded by its founder. We are actively looking for donors and sponsors to help cover infrastructure costs. All contributions will be managed transparently via Open Collective.

costs.question: Will OpenHospi ever become paid?
costs.answer: No. OpenHospi will never be freemium or pay-to-win. No student will ever have to pay to use the platform or get more visibility.

safety.question: How are users verified on OpenHospi?
safety.answer: Every user logs in through SURFconext, which is managed by their own university or hogeschool. This means only real students of Dutch educational institutions can use the platform.

safety.question: Are my messages private?
safety.answer: Yes. All chat messages on OpenHospi are end-to-end encrypted. Not even OpenHospi can read your conversations.

safety.question: What happens when I report a user?
safety.answer: Reports are reviewed by our team. We take action quickly, including blocking users who violate our terms of service.

findARoom.question: How do I find a room on OpenHospi?
findARoom.answer: Log in with your SURFconext account, complete your profile, browse available rooms by city and price, and send a personal message to houses you like.

findARoom.question: What is hospiteren?
findARoom.answer: Hospiteren is the traditional Dutch way of finding housemates. Houses invite candidates for a visit so both sides can see if it's a good fit before moving in.

features.title: SURFconext verification
features.description: Every user is verified by their own university or hogeschool through SURFconext. Your institution stands behind your profile. No fake profiles.

features.title: End-to-end encrypted chat
features.description: Messages are encrypted between sender and receiver. We cannot read your conversations.

features.title: No trackers
features.description: We don't use third-party trackers, analytics cookies, or sell your data.

features.title: GDPR compliant
features.description: We follow EU data protection regulations. You can export or delete your data anytime.

features.title: Open source
features.description: Our entire codebase is public. Anyone can audit how we handle your data.

features.title: Report & block
features.description: Report inappropriate behavior or block users with one click. We act on reports quickly. You can also reach us at abuse@openhospi.nl.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: OpenHospi exists to make student housing in the Netherlands fair, free, and accessible. We believe finding a room shouldn't cost money, and the process should be transparent. OpenHospi will never be freemium or pay-to-win: no one can pay to get more visibility. Every student gets the same chances.

crisis.title: The problem
crisis.description: Students search for rooms through Facebook groups, Instagram, and paid platforms. On commercial sites, you pay to see listings or get priority. That's unfair — the system works for platforms, not for students.

builtBy.title: How it started
builtBy.description: Ruben saw fellow students struggling with Facebook groups, Instagram, and paid platforms. He didn't experience it himself, but saw many around him dealing with it. That's how OpenHospi was born.

openSource.title: Open source & community
openSource.description: OpenHospi is a community project. Anyone can contribute code, translations, or ideas. We're transparent about everything we do.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about OpenHospi — the free, open-source student housing platform.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to us or check out our open-source project on GitHub.

items.question: What is OpenHospi?
items.answer: OpenHospi is a free, open-source student housing platform for the Netherlands. It connects students looking for a room with houses looking for a new housemate — through the traditional Dutch hospiteren process.

items.question: Who can use OpenHospi?
items.answer: Only verified students at Dutch universities and hogescholen. You log in with your institutional account via SURFconext, so every user is a real student.

items.question: Is OpenHospi available outside the Netherlands?
items.answer: Currently, OpenHospi is only available for students at Dutch educational institutions connected to SURFconext. We may expand in the future.

items.question: Is OpenHospi affiliated with any university or company?
items.answer: No. OpenHospi is an independent, community-driven open-source project. It was started by a student and is not owned or operated by any university, company, or housing corporation.

items.question: How do I create an account?
items.answer: Click 'Log in with SURFconext' and sign in with your university or hogeschool account. Your account is created automatically — no separate registration needed.

items.question: Why can I only log in with SURFconext?
items.answer: SURFconext ensures every user is a real, verified student. This prevents fake profiles, scams, and non-students from using the platform.

items.question: What happens when I graduate?
items.answer: When your institution deactivates your SURFconext account, you'll no longer be able to log in. Any active room listings will be automatically paused.

items.question: Can I delete my account?
items.answer: Yes. You can delete your account and all associated data from your profile settings at any time. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

items.question: How do I apply for a room?
items.answer: Browse available rooms, find one you like, and send a personal message to the house explaining why you'd be a good fit. If they're interested, they'll invite you for hospiteren.

items.question: What is hospiteren?
items.answer: Hospiteren is the traditional Dutch way of finding housemates. The house invites candidates for a visit — you meet the current housemates, see the room, and both sides decide if it's a good match.

items.question: Can I filter rooms by city, price, or other criteria?
items.answer: Yes. You can filter rooms by city, price range, room size, availability date, and house type to find exactly what you're looking for.

items.question: Do all students get the same visibility?
items.answer: Yes. There are no premium placements or paid boosts. Every student's application is treated equally — no one can pay to get ahead.

items.question: How do I list a room?
items.answer: Log in, create your house profile with photos and details, then publish your room listing. Verified students across the Netherlands can see it immediately.

items.question: Can I share my listing on social media?
items.answer: Yes. Every room gets a unique public link you can share on Instagram, WhatsApp, or anywhere else. Anyone can view the listing, but only verified students can apply.

items.question: How many rooms can I list?
items.answer: You can list one room per house at a time. If you have multiple rooms available, you can create separate listings for each.

items.question: Can I pause or remove my listing?
items.answer: Yes. You can pause your listing to temporarily hide it, or remove it entirely when the room is filled. You're always in control.

items.question: Are my messages encrypted?
items.answer: Yes. All chat messages on OpenHospi are end-to-end encrypted (E2EE). Not even OpenHospi can read your conversations — only you and the person you're chatting with.

items.question: Does OpenHospi use trackers or sell my data?
items.answer: No. We don't use third-party trackers, analytics cookies, or sell your data to anyone. Your privacy is fundamental to how we operate.

items.question: How do I report inappropriate behavior?
items.answer: You can report or block any user directly from their profile or chat. Reports are reviewed by our team and we act quickly. You can also email abuse@openhospi.nl.

items.question: How does OpenHospi protect against scams?
items.answer: Every user is verified through SURFconext, so you always know you're dealing with a real student. Combined with E2E encrypted chat and easy reporting, we make it very hard for bad actors.

items.question: Is OpenHospi really free?
items.answer: Yes, 100% free. No hidden fees, no premium plans, no ads. OpenHospi will never be freemium or pay-to-win.

items.question: How is the platform funded?
items.answer: OpenHospi is currently self-funded by its founder. We are actively looking for donors and sponsors to help cover infrastructure costs. All contributions will be managed transparently via Open Collective.

items.question: Will there ever be paid features?
items.answer: No. We believe student housing should be fair and equal. No student will ever have to pay to use the platform, get more visibility, or access features that others can't.
